channel.title: Introduction on TBD
channel.description: Recent content in Introduction on TBD

item.title: Publish to charmhub
item.description: Publish a charm to charmhub # Register a new charm’s name under your acount # charmcraft names charmcraft register karma-k8s Pack and upload charm # charmcraft pack charmcraft upload karma-k8s_ubuntu-20.04-amd64.charm charmcraft revisions karam-k8s Upload resource (e.g. OCI image) # charmcraft resources karma-k8s charmcraft status karma-k8s docker pull ghcr.io/prymitive/karma:v0.92 IMAGE_ID=$(docker images -q ghcr.io/prymitive/karma:v0.92) charmcraft upload-resource karma-k8s karma-image --image=$IMAGE_ID charmcraft resource-revisions karma-k8s karma-image Release # charmcraft release karma-k8s --channel=edge --revision=1 --resource=karma-image:1 charmcraft status karma-k8s Publish a bundle to charmhub # charmcraft names charmcraft register lma-light charmcraft revisions lma-light charmcraft pack charmcraft upload lma-light.

item.title: Playing with alertmanager config
item.description: Some people get excited by dates such as April 20, 2004, 8:04pm (20/04/2004, 20:04). Well, what if we could have alertmanager fire an alert every time the gregorian calendar looks exciting? alertmanager does offers quite a powerful configurational flexibility that we could use just for that. For the purpose of this exercise we will be generating dummy alerts, based on $elapsed=$(date +%s), the number of seconds since 1970-01-01, as follows:
